subject: Geography
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Weather and Climate
topics: Weather and climate play an important role in nearly all areas of life. It influences the clothes
activities: Learning about weather and climate helps learners connect what they learn in classroom with
the real -world experiences. This topic will focus on weather and climate, climate change and
mitigation and adaptation to climate change. The following Sub-topics would be covered under
o Mitigation and Adaptation to Climate Change
Hook: Your community is facing frequent floods. What weather related data would you collect
resources: o Cluster learners for interactive activities such as role plays
o Learners roleplay where they pretend to be weather forecasters or climate
scientists. Weather forecasters give daily or weekly weather reports but climate
scientists explain long term climate trends for a region
o Learners create a T-Chart where they list daily weather observations vs long term
assessment: Use a quick checklist while observing as learners roleplay
o Clear communication, accuracy of facts, team participation and creativity in presentation
o Conduct a quiz on weather and climate
Activity 2: Identifying the various elements of weather and climate (temperature, humidity,
